name: 🎤 Underground
description: DIY venues, gigs and attendees from the underground scene — three bronze sources joined into a silver fact, then aggregated.

pipelines.name: venues
pipelines.description: 50 DIY venues across European cities — capacity, year opened, type.

pipelines.name: gigs
pipelines.description: 500 gigs across the venues — date, artist, genre.

pipelines.name: attendees
pipelines.description: 5000 attendance records — who came, did they pay.

pipelines.name: gigs_with_venues
pipelines.description: Gigs joined to their venue — the convenient silver fact for the gold layer.

pipelines.name: attendance_per_gig
pipelines.description: One row per gig with total and paid attendee counts.

pipelines.name: attendance_by_venue
pipelines.description: Per-venue lifetime attendance — the heatmap of the scene.

pipelines.name: most_active_artists
pipelines.description: Artists ranked by total gigs and total attendance pulled.

quality_tests.name: gigs_have_venue
quality_tests.description: Every gig must reference a venue_id.

quality_tests.name: attendance_non_negative
quality_tests.description: Attendance counts can never be negative.
